source: https://www.airforce.com/bin/api/careers?careersRootPath=/content/airforce/en/careers — the Air Force's own live careers catalogue (234 published AFSCs), which flags each as ENLISTED or OFFICER.
method: Joined our catalogue codes against the Air Force's published list. FAIL CLOSED: a code absent from the Air Force's own catalogue is treated as NOT entry level.

Not published on the Air Force's own careers catalogue as an accession AFSC. Special-duty and reporting identifiers (recruiter, military training instructor, first sergeant and similar) are awarded by retraining after you are already serving — a civilian cannot enlist into them. We could not confirm an initial-entry path, so it is not offered.

jobs.code: 3N0X6 — CURRENT CODE, REPLACING THE LEGACY 3N0X1 (PUBLIC AFFAIRS WRITER), 3N0X2 (BROADCAST JOURNALIST), AND 3N0X5 (PHOTOJOURNALIST) AFSCS IN A 2020 CONSOLIDATION; AIRMEN HOLDING A LEGACY CODE HAD TO COMPLETE PUBLIC AFFAIRS CONSOLIDATION TRAINING BY 31 OCT 2021. NOTE: THIS PROJECT'S EARLIER TAXONOMY PASS (INTEREST-TAXONOMY.JSON) LISTED THE NOW-SUPERSEDED 3N0X2 CODE — 3N0X6 IS THE CURRENT DESIGNATION CONFIRMED IN THIS SESSION'S RESEARCH.
